game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
A Hat in Time is a cute-as-heck 3D platformer featuring a little girl who stitches hats for wicked powers! Freely explore giant worlds and recover Time Pieces to travel to new heights!

A Hat in Time is a cute-as-heck 3D platformer featuring a little girl who stitches hats for wicked powers.

A little girl and her spaceship

In A Hat in Time you play as a tiny space-travelling girl with a big tophat. Her adventure is halted when all her fuel, the Time Pieces, is lost and scattered across a nearby planet. Hat Kid must now jump, fight and stitch new hats to make her way into every nook and cranny of this new world in order to restore her fuel and resume her journey. On her way, she'll bump into the menacing Mafia of Cooks, the goofy birds of Dead Bird Studio, the spooky shadows of Subcon Forest, and more!

Murder on a train! Parades! Trespassing in a movie studio?

Every mission in A Hat in Time is unique! At one moment you'll be solving the Murder on the Owl Express by finding clues and interrogating the locals, the next moment you'll be the band marshal in The Big Parade, or sneaking through the bird-run Dead Bird Studio!

Small child, giant worlds

Jump freely around in 5 massive worlds with new adventures to discover around every corner! Just like any child, Hat Kid loves to climb and explore, no mountain is too big for her sense of adventure. She can do multiple jump moves, as well as climb walls, and swing over gaps!

Cute hats, magical yarn and snappy badges

By finding and collecting rare magical yarn, Hat Kid can stitch new cute hats with a variety of abilities, including a witch hat that allows her to cook explosive concoctions, and a wooden ghost mask that allows her to peek into other dimensions. Hats can become even more powerful, by attaching badges that are found, sold and traded by the locals!

Community-funded, community-focused

A Hat in Time was successfully funded on Kickstarter, reaching nearly 10 times its goal! In order to celebrate our community, A Hat in Time is releasing with full modding and Steam Workshop support, an in-game screenshot mode, and more!
game_info.description: You are Hat Kid, a tiny space-traveling girl on a mission to collect scattered Time Pieces across a magical world! Jump through platforming challenges, avoid hazards, and collect yarn to unlock powerful hats. Sprint hat gives you speed boost, brewing hat creates explosive potions, and dimension hat reveals hidden secrets. Collect all Time Pieces to win and restore your spaceship's fuel!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move left/right, climb ladders
Space: Jump (press again in air for double jump)
Shift: Sprint (when wearing Sprint Hat)
Z: Use hat ability (Brewing Hat creates explosion, Dimension Hat reveals secrets)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement mechanics including walking, jumping, double-jumping, and ladder climbing. Validates that the player can navigate the world and reach different platforms.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Performs a series of movements including walking left and right, jumping to reach higher platforms, using double jump for distant platforms, and climbing ladders to test vertical navigation.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves around the level, reaches various platforms, climbs ladders without getting stuck, and demonstrates all movement capabilities work correctly.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the optimal strategy to win the game by collecting all Time Pieces efficiently. This validates the complete gameplay loop and win condition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate through the level systematically, collecting yarn to unlock hats, using sprint hat for speed, brewing hat to destroy obstacles, and dimension hat to reveal hidden Time Pieces. Prioritizes collecting all Time Pieces in the most efficient path.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully collects all required Time Pieces (5 total) within a reasonable time frame, unlocks all hat abilities, and triggers the GAME_OVER_WIN condition.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests hazard interactions and death mechanics. Validates that touching spikes or falling into pits correctly triggers game over condition.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Deliberately walks into spikes and falls into pits to test collision detection and game over logic. Verifies respawn doesn't occur mid-game.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Game correctly detects hazard collisions, triggers GAME_OVER_LOSE state, and displays appropriate game over screen with restart option.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests hat switching and ability usage. Validates that collecting yarn unlocks hats and abilities work as intended.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Collects yarn strategically, cycles through available hats, and tests each hat's unique ability including sprint boost, explosive brewing, and dimension reveal.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Hats unlock after collecting sufficient yarn, abilities activate correctly with Z key, and visual feedback confirms ability usage.
